title: Name age and monastic rank are unresolved
claim_or_observation: Current research does not establish one final spelling exact numerical age monastic rank lineage or institution for Aravana Adigal
notes: Binding casting costume dialogue and publicity safeguard

title: Aravana is described as elderly
claim_or_observation: The translation describes him with white hair and a trembling tongue when Manimekalai Madhavi and Sudhamathi approach
notes: Verify exact Tamil physical vocabulary and interpretive range

title: Three women seek his place together
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai returns with Madhavi and Sudhamathi and they search for and approach Aravana's place
notes: Verify spatial institutional and relational terminology

title: He receives Manimekalai's account before teaching
claim_or_observation: Manimekalai narrates the garden Manipallavam previous births mantras Deepathilahai and the vessel before Aravana responds
notes: Map exact dialogue sequence and interruptions

title: He interprets previous-birth relationships
claim_or_observation: Aravana connects Manimekalai Madhavi and Sudhamathi with earlier births and offers karmic explanation
notes: Separate textual doctrine emotional effect and present autonomy

title: He teaches Madhavi after Kovalan's death
claim_or_observation: Madhavi reports seeking Aravana and receiving teaching concerning desire conduct peace and freedom from repeated birth
notes: Verify five-offence terminology monastery wording and chronology

title: He narrates Aputhiran and the vessel
claim_or_observation: Aravana tells the life of Aputhiran and explains the history and ethical purpose of the Amudhasurabhi

title: He directs the vessel toward public hunger
claim_or_observation: Aravana tells Manimekalai not to hide the vessel and connects it with famine compassion and feeding people

title: He contributes to Manimekalai's release
claim_or_observation: Madhavi and Sudhamathi seek Aravana's help and he approaches the queen or palace authority concerning Manimekalai's release
notes: Verify exact agency access and custody sequence

title: He travels after the loss of Puhar
claim_or_observation: Aravana says he left Puhar with Manimekalai's mothers and later reached Vanji and Kanchi
notes: Verify flood chronology route and companion sequence

title: He teaches perception and inference
claim_or_observation: After Manimekalai hears rival philosophies Aravana begins a structured Buddhist lesson on valid knowledge including perception and inference
notes: Requires classical Tamil and Buddhist logic review

title: Mentor appears at distinct life transitions
claim_or_observation: Aravana functions as receiver of grief interpreter of revelation ethical narrator public advocate displaced elder and final reasoning teacher
notes: Do not imply continuous surveillance or control

title: Age is not weakness or automatic wisdom
claim_or_observation: White hair and trembling speech cannot be used for comic frailty passivity confusion or unquestioned omniscience
notes: Binding actor movement camera and edit rule

title: Teacher statements remain open to contextual review
claim_or_observation: Karmic gendered social and sectarian statements attributed to Aravana require original-text historical and ethical review rather than automatic endorsement
notes: Binding screenplay philosophy and publicity rule

title: No generic pan-Buddhist monk design
claim_or_observation: Aravana cannot be assigned a modern Theravada Tibetan East Asian or later South Indian monastic visual system without evidence
notes: Binding costume architecture and production-design rule

title: Teaching should be dialogic and concrete
claim_or_observation: Narrative analogy objects observed conditions and student error can make Aravana's instruction dramatically active
notes: Requires philosophy dialogue and actor testing

title: Palace intervention relies on moral authority
claim_or_observation: His influence before Rajamadevi should operate through reputation testimony relationships and ethical pressure rather than supernatural command
notes: Requires exact textual legal and political review
